description: Convert a residential villa shell into a fully functional public branch library. The building shell is pre-drafted in Sweet Home 3D and is already open on screen with all furniture removed. Create at least 5 functional zones: Adult Reading Area, Children's Area, Reference Stacks, Circulation Desk, and Staff Workroom. Define these zones by applying a room name or placing a text label for each, and apply distinct floor colors or textures to visually differentiate at least 3 of these zones. Furnish the library with at least 10 shelving units (bookcases/shelves) for the Reference Stacks, at least 6 tables and 12 chairs for reading/study areas, and at least 2 desks for the circulation/service area. Add ambient elements by placing at least 4 lamps and 3 plants/decor items. Place at least 3 text labels on the floor plan for wayfinding signage. Source all items from Sweet Home 3D's built-in catalog. Save the completed design to /home/ga/Documents/library_design.sh3d.
